name: applILTxPending
title: applILTxPending
syntax: dword applILTxPending(long aId, dword aDlc, byte data[]);
description: This callback is optionally being called before the IL sends a message to the bus. In this callback it is possible to prevent the sending of the message or to change the data of the message.

parameters.name: aId
parameters.description: With the ID you can identify the message.

return: 0: sending of the message with the supplied aId is prevented

description: Calculation of a checksum and a message counter:
